MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Hart of Law Offices of David L. Hart telephone number 650-355-3000 for Plaintiff Sylvia Ortiz.
Rebecca Liu of Office of the City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3870 for Respondent San Francisco Employees Retirement System.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PETITIONER SYLVIA ORTIZ Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandate Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5 is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
